steps.title: Identify the action's outcome
steps.content: The key clue is “so high that Gogol must tip his head back in order to see”—this reveals the effect of the action described by raise.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: The target meaning is to move something upward. Lift directly expresses this action. The other three choices don't fit this meaning. That matches choice B — B is correct.
